news.author: Benzinga Newsdesk
news.headline: Fed's Powell Signals Rate Hike On The Table As Inflation Runs Hot; Hawkish Tone Sinks Stocks
news.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell said the FOMC is prepared to raise rates further if inflation fails to cool, a hawkish shift that sent equities plunging into the close.

news.author: Reuters
news.headline: State Street names new CFO effective next quarter
news.summary: State Street Corp said it appointed a new chief financial officer, effective the start of the next quarter, as part of a planned leadership transition.

news.author: Benzinga Newsdesk
news.headline: Nvidia Shares Surge After Earnings Beat, Record Revenue And Upgraded Guidance Lift Broader Market
news.summary: Nvidia stock rallied after the chipmaker crushed earnings estimates, posted record revenue and raised its full-year guidance, lifting the S&P 500 to fresh highs.
